title: Latest revendoring deleted the cmd dir in varlink

comments.body:
Remove the gitignore, makefile, and travis.yml

This is why building from a vendor/ dir is a bad idea - vendor tools will automatically remove any code we do not directly use.

We have been playing with a hack in skopeo to do something like this, to keep man pages.

```
vendor-image:
	vndr -whitelist '^github.com/containers/image/docs/.*' github.com/containers/image
```

But we also add a test to the Makefile to make sure the user did not vendor in something without using this command.
```
test-docs:
	@test -f vendor/github.com/containers/image/docs/policy.json.md || (echo "\
Missing containers/image docs, need to make * vendor-image * \
" && exit 1)
```
